news.title: Neues Lokal "Biernat's" – Kölsch statt Spritzer – Bar bringt Köln-Flair nach Wien - Heute
news.summary:
# Summary

A new bar called "Biernat's" has opened in Vienna, bringing the authentic beer culture and atmosphere of Cologne (Köln) to the Austrian capital. The establishment specializes in Kölsch, the traditional Cologne beer, offering visitors an alternative to Vienna's typical wine and spritzer culture. Visitors to Vienna who want to experience German beer culture or try authentic Cologne beer will find this a worthwhile new destination.

news.title: Groep van 33 personen daagt niet op bij restaurant De Bomma: "Menu stond klaar, maar ze stuurden hun kat" - GVA
news.summary:
# Summary

Instead of canceling or attending, the group apparently sent a cat to the restaurant as a prank or message. Visitors should be aware that restaurants like De Bomma may implement stricter cancellation policies or deposit requirements due to incidents like this.
